---
title: "Y95 analyses"
author: "Anders Skyrud Danielsen"
date: "2026-04-10"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

# Set up library paths 
.libPaths(c("", .libPaths()))

# Silencing some stuff, flick code switch on or off!
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, 
  warning = T,
  message = T)

# Ensure correct encoding
Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = "Norwegian") 

# Load required packages
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse,
  lubridate,
  readr,
  readxl,
  tidylog,
  gt,
  gtsummary,
  viridis
)

# Set global options
options(scipen = 999) # Prevent scientific notation for large numbers

```

## Setup

```{r load data}

# Load the data
nohai_episode <- read_csv2("",
                           col_types = cols(
                             nprEpisodeId	= col_character(), 
                             nprInstitusjonId	= col_character(),
                             nprBehandlingsstedId	= col_character(),
                             nprAvdelingId	= col_character(),
                             nprHenvisningsperiodeId = col_character()
                           )) %>% 
  mutate(year=year(inndatotid)) %>% 
  filter(year>=2020 & year<=2024)

nohai_pasient <- read_csv2("") %>% 
  rename(lopeNr = lopenr)

nohai_enhet <- read_csv2("",
                         col_types = cols( 
                           nprepisodeid	= col_character(), 
                           nprbehandlingsstedId	= col_character(),
                           nprAvdelingId	= col_character(),
                         ))

nohai_institusjon <- read_csv2("",
                            col_types = cols( 
                              nprInstitusjonId = col_character()
                            ))

nohai_kode <- read_csv2("",
                            col_types = cols( 
                              nprEpisodeId = col_character(),
                              nprTilstandId = col_character()
                            ))

hospitalID_data <- read_xlsx("") %>%
  select(HospitalID = ID, institusjonId, behandlingsstedLokal, ForetakNavn, HelseforetakNavn)

```

```{r data wrangling}

# Clean raw episode data
nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode %>%
  rename(lopeNr = lopenr) %>% 
  filter(inntilstand != 2) %>%  # Remove dead on arrival
  select(nprEpisodeId, nprInstitusjonId, lopeNr, inndatotid, utdatotid, nprBehandlingsstedId, nprAvdelingId, omsorgsniva) %>%
  mutate(
    inndatotid = as.Date(inndatotid, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    utdatotid = as.Date(utdatotid, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
    nprbehandlingsstedId = nprBehandlingsstedId  # fix consistent variable names
  )

# Merge hospital info
nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode_clean %>%
  left_join(nohai_enhet %>%
              select(nprepisodeid , behandlingsstedLokal) %>% 
              rename(nprEpisodeId = nprepisodeid), 
            by = "nprEpisodeId") %>%
  left_join(nohai_institusjon, by = "nprInstitusjonId")

nohai_episode_clean$behandlingsstedLokal <- stringr::str_replace_all(nohai_episode_clean$behandlingsstedLokal, "\\s", " ")
hospitalID_data$behandlingsstedLokal <- stringr::str_replace_all(hospitalID_data$behandlingsstedLokal, "\\s", " ")

nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode_clean %>% ## NB! Nødvendig å mappe en hel rekke rader manuelt her om dette skal brukes
  left_join(hospitalID_data, by = c("institusjonId", "behandlingsstedLokal")) %>%
  distinct()

# Merge patient info
nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode_clean %>%
  left_join(nohai_pasient, by = "lopeNr") %>%
  distinct()

# Attach ICD-10 codes (without creating flags yet)
nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode_clean %>%
  left_join(nohai_kode %>%
              group_by(nprEpisodeId) %>%
              summarise(
                icd10_codes_episode = list(unique(kodeVerdi))
              ) %>%
              ungroup(),
            by = "nprEpisodeId")

# Resolve duplicate lopeNr issues in npr_episode
nohai_episode_clean <- nohai_episode_clean %>%
  # Replace lopeNr with samme_person if nprEpisodeId is duplicated
  mutate(
    lopeNr = if_else(
      nprEpisodeId %in% nprEpisodeId[duplicated(nprEpisodeId)],
      samme_person,
      lopeNr
    )
  ) %>%
  # Remove duplicates based on nprEpisodeId
  distinct(nprEpisodeId, .keep_all = TRUE) 

```

```{r aggregate}

# Aggregate dataset from episodes to stays 

episodes_to_stitch <- nohai_episode_clean %>%
  arrange(lopeNr, HospitalID, inndatotid)  # No select! Keep everything

episodes_with_stays <- episodes_to_stitch %>%
  group_by(lopeNr, HospitalID) %>%
  mutate(
    time_since_last_discharge = as.numeric(inndatotid - lag(utdatotid)),
    new_stay = case_when(
      is.na(time_since_last_discharge) ~ 1,
      time_since_last_discharge > 1 ~ 1,
      time_since_last_discharge <= 1 ~ 0
    ),
    stay_id = cumsum(new_stay)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

episodes_with_stays <- episodes_with_stays %>%
  mutate(
    stay_id_full = paste0(lopeNr, "_", HospitalID, "_", stay_id)
  )

# Collapse to stay-level

nohai_stay_level <- episodes_with_stays %>%
  group_by(stay_id_full) %>%
  summarise(
    lopeNr = first(lopeNr),                              # Patient ID
    same_person = first(samme_person),                    # Keep same_person if needed
    HospitalID = first(HospitalID),
    nprInstitusjonId = first(nprInstitusjonId),
    behandlingsstedLokal = first(behandlingsstedLokal),
    
    stay_admission = min(inndatotid, na.rm = TRUE),       # Earliest admission
    stay_discharge = if_else(all(is.na(utdatotid)), NA_Date_, max(utdatotid, na.rm = TRUE)), # Latest discharge

    episode_ids = list(unique(nprEpisodeId)),             # List of episode IDs
    all_icd10_codes = list(flatten_chr(icd10_codes_episode)), # Flatten all ICD-10 codes

    sex = first(kjonn),                                     # Static patient characteristics
    fodselsaar = first(fodselsar)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```

```{r define sepsis and HAI}

# Define point prevalence survey (PPS) dates
pps_dates <- as.Date(c(
  "2015-05-06", "2015-11-04", "2016-05-11", "2016-11-02",
  "2017-05-10", "2017-11-08", "2018-05-30", "2018-11-07",
  "2019-05-22", "2019-11-06", "2020-05-13", "2020-11-04",
  "2021-05-19", "2021-11-03", "2022-05-11", "2022-11-02",
  "2023-05-10", "2023-11-01", "2024-05-29", "2024-11-06"
))

# Define ICD-10 code lists ---------------------------

# Helper: expand ICD-10 ranges like A07/A09 → A7, A8, A9, A007, A008, A009
expand_icd10_range <- function(start_code, end_code) {
  start_letter <- str_extract(start_code, "^[A-Z]")
  start_num <- as.integer(str_extract(start_code, "\\d+"))
  end_num <- as.integer(str_extract(end_code, "\\d+"))
  codes <- map(start_num:end_num, ~ c(
    paste0(start_letter, .x),
    paste0(start_letter, sprintf("%03d", .x))
  ))
  flatten_chr(codes)
}

# Explicit sepsis codes
explicit_sepsis_codes <- c("A02.1", "A20.7", "A21.7", "A22.7", "A24.1", "A26.7", "A28.2",
                           "A32.7", "A39.2", "A39.4", "A40", "A41", "A42.7", "B00.7", "B37.7") %>%
  str_replace_all("\\.", "")  # remove decimals to match Y95-style coding

# Infection focus ranges
infection_ranges <- c("A04", "A05", "A07/A09", "A46", "A60.0", "A69.1", "A81/A89", "B08/B09", "G00/08",
                      "H70.0", "I33", "I38/40.0", "J01/06", "J12/18", "J20/22", "J36", "J39.0/39.1",
                      "J85/86", "K35/37", "K61", "K63.0/63.1", "K65", "K75.0", "K81.0", "K83.0", "L02/04",
                      "L08", "M00/01", "M72.6", "M86", "N10", "N15.1", "N30", "N39.0", "N41.0", "N41.2",
                      "N41.3", "N45", "N70/74", "N98.0", "N49", "O03.0", "O03.5", "O04.5", "O08.0", "O23",
                      "O88.3", "O91", "T80.2", "T81.4", "T82.6/82.7", "T83.5/83.6", "T84.5/84.7", "T85.7",
                      "T88.0")

# Organ failure ranges
organ_failure_ranges <- c("D65", "D69.5", "E87.2", "G93.4", "I46", "I95.9", "J80", "J95.2", "J96",
                          "K72.0", "K72.9", "N00", "N17", "N99.0", "R02", "R09.0", "R09.2", "R40.0",
                          "R40.2", "R41", "R55", "R57", "R57.2", "R65.1")

# Expand ranges
expand_list <- function(ranges) {
  ranges %>%
    map(function(x) {
      parts <- str_split(x, "/", simplify = TRUE)
      if (length(parts) == 1) {
        code <- str_replace_all(parts[1], "\\.", "")
        return(c(code))
      } else {
        expand_icd10_range(str_replace_all(parts[1], "\\.", ""),
                           str_replace_all(parts[2], "\\.", ""))
      }
    }) %>%
    flatten_chr() %>%
    unique()
}

infection_codes <- expand_list(infection_ranges)
organ_failure_codes <- expand_list(organ_failure_ranges)

# Apply to stay-level data ---------------------------

nohai_stay_level <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  mutate(
    icd_flat = map_chr(all_icd10_codes, ~ paste(.x, collapse = ";")),
    
    y95_present = str_detect(icd_flat, "\\bY95\\b") %>% as.integer(),

    explicit_sepsis = map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") %in% explicit_sepsis_codes)),
    
    has_infection_code = map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") %in% infection_codes)),
    has_organ_failure_code = map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") %in% organ_failure_codes)),

    implicit_sepsis = (has_infection_code & has_organ_failure_code),
    
    any_sepsis = as.integer(explicit_sepsis | implicit_sepsis),
    
    sepsis_focus = case_when(
      explicit_sepsis ~ "unknown",
      implicit_sepsis ~ map_chr(all_icd10_codes, ~ .x[str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") %in% infection_codes][1]),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Flag overlap with point prevalence survey ---------
nohai_stay_level <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(
  pps_overlap = as.integer(any(pps_dates >= (stay_admission - 7) & pps_dates <= (stay_discharge + 7)))
) %>%
ungroup()

```

## Results 

Figure 1: Patient characteristics 

```{r figure 1}

nohai_stay_level %>% 
  arrange(stay_admission) %>% 
  distinct(same_person, .keep_all = T) %>% 
  mutate(age = year(stay_admission) - fodselsaar) %>%  
  summarise(
    count_sex2 = sum(sex == 2),
    proportion_sex2 = mean(sex == 2),  
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE), 
    mean_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1_age = quantile(age, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),  
    q3_age = quantile(age, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)  
  ) %>% 
  print()

# Explicit sepsis
explicit_sepsis_stats <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(explicit_sepsis == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_y95 = sum(y95_present, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = "Explicitly coded sepsis")

# Implicit sepsis
implicit_sepsis_stats <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(implicit_sepsis == 1) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_y95 = sum(y95_present, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(group = "Implicitly coded sepsis")

```

# Table 1

```{r table 1}

# --- Numerators from our Y95 data ---

# Pneumonia codes with Y95
pneumonia_codes <- c("J13", "J14", paste0("J15", 0:9), paste0("J17", 0:8),
                     paste0("J18", 0:9))

pneumonia_y95 <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(y95_present == 1) %>%
  filter(map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") %in% pneumonia_codes))) %>%
  nrow()

# UTI codes with Y95
uti_y95 <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(y95_present == 1) %>%
  filter(map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") == "N390"))) %>%
  nrow()

# SSI codes with Y95
ssi_y95 <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(y95_present == 1) %>%
  filter(map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_remove_all(.x, "\\.") == "T814"))) %>%
  nrow()

# --- Denominators from FHI open statistics (2020-2024 totals) ---
pneumonia_total <- 118484
uti_total       <- 77754
ssi_total       <- 42513

# --- Build table ---
table1_data <- bind_rows(
  explicit_sepsis_stats %>% mutate(n_denom = n_total),
  implicit_sepsis_stats %>% mutate(n_denom = n_total),
  tibble(group = "Bacterial pneumonia (J13–J18)",
         n_y95 = pneumonia_y95, n_denom = pneumonia_total),
  tibble(group = "Urinary tract infection (N39.0)",
         n_y95 = uti_y95, n_denom = uti_total),
    tibble(group = "Surgical site infection (T81.4)",
         n_y95 = ssi_y95, n_denom = ssi_total)
) %>%
  mutate(
    prop_y95 = n_y95 / n_denom,
    pct_y95  = sprintf("%.2f%%", prop_y95 * 100)
  ) %>%
  select(
    `Condition`       = group,
    `Total episodes`  = n_denom,
    `Episodes with Y95` = n_y95,
    `% with Y95`      = pct_y95
  )

# Export
write_csv2(table1_data, "table_1.csv")

table1_data
```


Figure 2: Incidence rate of Y95-coded episodes.

```{r figure 2}

# Create date variable for grouping
nohai_stay_level <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  mutate(month_start = floor_date(as.Date(stay_admission), unit = "month"))

# Monthly patient days — distribute annual values equally across months
monthly_patient_days <- tibble(
  year = 2020:2024,
  annual_days = c(3393647, 3655588, 3748851, 3734708, 3677218)
) %>%
  mutate(patient_days_per_month = annual_days / 12)

# Prepare Y95 counts per month
y95_plot_data <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(!is.na(month_start), year(month_start) %in% 2020:2024) %>%
  group_by(month_start) %>%
  summarise(
    y95_stays = sum(y95_present, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(month_start)
  ) %>%
  left_join(monthly_patient_days, by = "year") %>%
  mutate(
    incidence_rate = (y95_stays / patient_days_per_month) * 100000
  )

# Plot
y95_plot <- ggplot(y95_plot_data, aes(x = month_start, y = incidence_rate)) +
  geom_line(color = viridis(1, option = "D"), size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = viridis(1, option = "D"), size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey30", size = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b %Y",
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.05))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::label_comma(),
    name = "Y95 per 100,000 bed-days"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Month and year") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
y95_plot

ggsave("Figure 1.png", y95_plot, width = 12, height = 8)

```

Figure 3: Proportion of St. Olavs

```{r figure 4}


# Flag T81 in list or flat string
nohai_stay_level <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  mutate(
    T81_flag = case_when(
     # map_lgl(all_icd10_codes, ~ any(str_starts(.x, "T81"))) ~ 1,
      str_detect(icd_flat, "\\bT81") ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

nohai_stay_level <- nohai_stay_level %>% 
  mutate(year = year(stay_admission)) %>%
  mutate(
    hospital_group = case_when(
      str_detect(behandlingsstedLokal, regex("St\\. Olav|ST OLAV", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "St. Olav's hospital", 
      TRUE ~ "Other hospitals"
    ),
    T81_label = if_else(T81_flag == 1, "With T81", "Without T81")
  )

# Prepare base data
t81_y95_grouped <- nohai_stay_level %>%
  filter(y95_present == 1) %>%
  count(year, hospital_group, T81_label) %>%
  complete(year, hospital_group, T81_label, fill = list(n = 0))  # ensure all combos present

# Add fill colour and alpha
plot_data <- t81_y95_grouped %>%
  mutate(
    fill_colour = case_when(
      hospital_group == "St. Olav's hospital" ~ viridis(1, begin = 0.3, end = 0.4),
      hospital_group == "Other hospitals" ~ viridis(1, begin = 0.6, end = 0.7)
    ),
    alpha_value = if_else(T81_label == "With T81", 1, 0.4),
    fill_group = paste(hospital_group, T81_label, sep = " - ")
  )

# Add a fill_group variable
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos = as.numeric(factor(year)) + if_else(hospital_group == "St. Olav's hospital", -0.15, 0.15),
    fill_group = paste(hospital_group, T81_label, sep = " – ")
  )

# Define custom colours
fill_colours <- c(
  "St. Olav's hospital – With T81"  = viridis(1, begin = 0.2, alpha = 1),
  "St. Olav's hospital – Without T81" = viridis(1, begin = 0.2, alpha = 0.4),
  "Other hospitals – With T81"       = viridis(1, begin = 0.6, alpha = 1),
  "Other hospitals – Without T81"      = viridis(1, begin = 0.6, alpha = 0.4)
)

# Plot
st_olavs_plot <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = x_pos, y = n, fill = fill_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.3, position = "stack") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(sort(unique(plot_data$year))),
    labels = sort(unique(plot_data$year)),
    name = "Year"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_colours, name = "Hospital and T81-coding") +
  labs(y = "Number of Y95-coded stays") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top"
  )
st_olavs_plot

ggsave("Figure 3.png", st_olavs_plot, width = 12, height = 8)


```
